# ADR-017 — Skill candidate promotion criteria · summary

_Generated heuristically (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). For higher quality summaries, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY._

- Add `~/.great_cto/global-skills/` to the agent skill-discovery path (currently scans `~/.claude/`, `
- Filter loaded skills by the current project's archetype (read from PROJECT.md)
- Update `scripts/skill-discover.sh` to include the new path
- **Force promote** a single decision: `node scripts/promote-skill.mjs <slug>` (Phase 4)
- **Demote** a skill back to decisions.md: `mv ~/.great_cto/global-skills/<slug> ~/.great_cto/skills-d

- **Full doc:** docs/architecture/ADR-017-skill-candidate-promotion.md
